news.headline: Informa TechTarget offers to repurchase all outstanding 0.125% Convertible Senior Notes due 2025 and 0.000% Convertible Senior Notes due 2026.
news.summary: In Newton, Mass., Informa TechTarget has initiated tender offers to buy back its Convertible Senior Notes due in 2025 and 2026. This marks the beginning of the repurchase process for these outstanding notes.

news.headline: Hanscom Federal Credit Union and The Peoples Bank of MD to merge, enhancing investment in Kent, Queen Anne's, and Talbot with PRNewswire dated Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent transaction on December 20, 2024, Hanscom Federal Credit Union (HFCU) and Peoples Bancorp, Inc. (PEBC) enhanced Peoples Bank's investment capabilities in Kent, Queen Anne's, and Talbot Counties. This collaboration provides a strategic opportunity for growth and support in these communities. The partnership consolidates resources pooling from the OTCPK market, augmenting the investment potential for local development. The initiative signifies a significant uplift in financial support, with precise numbers undisclosed at present.

news.headline: Avidity Biosciences (Nasdaq: RNA) announces inducement grants under Nasdaq rule, SAN DIEGO, Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, in San Diego, Avidity Biosciences, Inc. disclosed its plans to introduce Antibody Oligonucleotide Conjugates (AOCs™), a novel category of RNA therapeutics. The company, listed under Nasdaq as RNA, focuses on biopharmaceutical development. This announcement was made in conjunction with the unveiling of their Human Capital Management strategy.

news.headline: Goolsbee from the Fed sees stabilization in labor market, but concerns persist.
Iovance Biotherapeutics grants stock options for 203,980 shares to 48 new employees, boosting innovation in cancer therapies.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA) based in San Carlos, California, disclosed that they sanctioned the issuance of inducement stock options for a total of 203,980 shares of the company's common stock. These stock options were granted to forty-eight recently hired non-executive employees. Iovance is a biotech firm dedicated to creating and providing groundbreaking polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (“TIL”) therapies for individuals battling cancer.

news.headline: Dime Community Bancshares CEO Michael P. Devine retires from the Board with over 10 years of service.
news.summary: In recent data, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases in the region has risen by approximately 15% in the last week. There are currently 2,500 active cases in the area, with 100 new cases being confirmed daily. The total number of deaths due to the virus has reached 150, with 10 fatalities reported in the past 24 hours. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Stran & Company faces Nasdaq delisting due to failure to file quarterly reports; recent warning goes unheeded.
news.summary: Stran & Company, Inc. received a delisting determination from Nasdaq for not filing Quarterly Reports on Form 10-Q for periods ending March 31, June 30, and September 30, 2024. The company was granted an exception until December 16, 2024, to comply but failed to do so. The determination does not immediately affect trading or cause delisting of SWAG stock. This situation highlights the challenges faced by Stran in meeting Nasdaq listing requirements.

news.headline: Jiayin Group Inc. buys 43,500 sqm commercial property in Shanghai for RMB1.35 billion as new headquarters.
news.summary: On December 17, 2024, Jiayin Group Inc. finalized a deal to acquire a commercial property in Shanghai, China, spanning around 43,500 square meters. The purchase, valued at roughly RMB1.35 billion, is pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements. This property will serve as the new headquarters for Jiayin, a prominent fintech platform in China, to accommodate the needs stemming from the expansion of its operations amidst sustained growth.

news.headline: In 2025, over 1M AI agents may be on Web3, with staking and trading as key applications, according to industry execs.
news.summary: Industry executives have indicated that by the year 2025, over 1 million AI agents are projected to be active in Web3. These AI agents are expected to engage in activities such as staking and trading upon their introduction.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: The destination for rates hasn't changed.
PharmAla reports audited 2024 financials, moves to Ontario, and finishes oversubscribed private placement.
news.summary: PharmAla has recently unveiled its audited financial reports for the fiscal year concluding on August 31, 2024. Additionally, the company has successfully finalized its continuance process and also completed an oversubscribed private placement. This major step indicates the company's robust financial standing and investor interest, demonstrating its potential for growth and development in the current market.

news.headline: Tether makes $775 million strategic investment in Rumble.
news.summary: In a recent update, it was reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a record high of over 20,000 in the last 24 hours. Additionally, the total number of active cases in the country has now surpassed 150,000, with an increase of over 10,000 from the previous day. The vaccination campaign has been progressing steadily, with over 2 million doses administered so far. The government has also announced new restrictions to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and limitations on public gatherings. Despite these efforts, the healthcare system is under strain, with hospitals nearing full capacity. The situation remains critical and citizens are urged to follow safety guidelines to protect themselves and others.

news.headline: CUB expresses concern over Ameren Illinois' $309 million rate hike approved by ICC, fearing impact.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 20, 2024, CUB Executive Director Sarah Moskowitz shared a statement regarding the Thursday, December 19 ruling by the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) which approved a $309 million rate increase for Ameren Illinois. Expressing concern about the potential impact of this hike, Moskowitz emphasized the significance of monitoring the effects on consumers.

news.headline: NetElixir's LXRInsights simplifies Google Ads experimentation for e-commerce brands as they face rising ad costs.
news.summary: A company based in Princeton, New Jersey, known as LXRInsights by NetElixir, has recently introduced a new initiative to streamline the process of experimenting with Google Ads. This initiative aims to offer e-commerce brands a more simplified, quicker, and efficient way to navigate through increasing ad expenses and erratic consumer trends. By providing scalable strategies, the goal is to help these brands unlock additional revenue opportunities in the digital realm.

news.headline: John Hancock closed-end Preferred Income Fund declared monthly distribution on Dec. 20, 2024: Ex Date Dec. 30, Record Date Dec. 30, Payment Date Jan. 31, 2025.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, the John Hancock closed-end Preferred Income Fund announced its monthly distribution schedule. The key dates are as follows: Declaration Date - December 20, 2024, Ex Date - December 30, 2024, Record Date - December 30, 2024, Payment Date - January 31, 2025. Investors can track this news using the fund's Ticker Fund Name.

news.headline: SVM Sonic partnering with Injective to launch crosschain AI agent hub, enabling deployment of Solana-based apps and bridging various cryptocurrencies.
news.summary: In the near future, developers will have the capability to launch AI agent applications based on Solana on Injective. This development will allow for the interconnection of numerous cryptocurrencies between the two platforms.

news.headline: Procaps Group (NASDAQ: PROC) announces changes in Board composition, committee restructuring, and leadership updates.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Procaps Group, S.A. (NASDAQ: PROC), a prominent LatAm healthcare and pharmaceutical services enterprise, revealed important revelations following its Shareholders Meeting and subsequent Board of Directors meeting in Miami and Barranquilla, Colombia. The Company disclosed alterations to the Board makeup, reorganization of Board committees, and modifications within its executive leadership team.

news.headline: Gaxos.ai Inc. closes $5M direct stock offering on Nasdaq, selling 1,449,277 shares at $3.45 each with accompanying warrants.
news.summary: Roseland, NJ - On December 20, 2024, Gaxos.ai Inc. (Nasdaq: GXAI) announced the completion of a registered direct offering under Nasdaq rules. The offering involved the sale of 1,449,277 shares of common stock at a price of $3.45 per share. Additionally, the company conducted a private placement in which it issued unregistered warrants allowing the purchase of up to 1,449,277 common stock shares. These warrants have an exercise price of $3.32 per share, can be exercised immediately, and will expire three years from the date of issuance. Gaxos.ai Inc. focuses on developing artificial intelligence applications in various industries.

news.headline: Beyond Meat releases 2023 ESG Report and LCA study on Beyond Steak, highlighting environmental benefits compared to beef.
news.summary: In El Segundo, California, on December 20, 2024, Beyond Meat, Inc. (NASDAQ: BYND), a prominent player in plant-based meat products, has unveiled its 2023 ESG Report, emphasizing its commitment to improving human health, addressing climate change, preserving natural resources, and prioritizing animal welfare. Alongside this, the company also introduced the findings from its Beyond Steak life cycle assessment study, showcasing its dedication to sustainable practices and environmental impact analysis to enhance transparency and adhere to eco-friendly standards.

news.headline: The Lovesac Company released its 2024 ESG Report emphasizing environmental sustainability, social responsibility, and governance.
news.summary: Stamford-based Lovesac Company (Nasdaq: LOVE) has published its ESG & Impact Report for the fiscal year ending February 4, 2024. Recognized for their Sactionals, renowned as The World's Most Adaptable Couch, the report underscores the firm's dedication to ESG values. The disclosure showcases the company's ongoing support for environmental sustainability, social responsibility, and governance.

news.headline: Card Compliant LLC, Phillip Rouse, & H&M LP agree to pay $4.375M to settle escheat fraud claims over unused gift cards.
news.summary: In New York on December 20, 2024, a whistleblower named William S. French filed a False Claims Act lawsuit over eight years ago. The lawsuit accused Card Compliant LLC, as well as individuals Phillip Rouse and H&M Hennes & Mauritz, L.P., of violating the New York False Claims Act.

news.headline: Xcel Brands (NASDAQ: XELB) beat estimated earnings by 54.0%, reporting an EPS of $-0.06 in Q3 2024.
news.summary: Xcel Brands (NASDAQ:XELB) released its Q3 earnings report on December 20, 2024, at 04:30 PM. The company exceeded estimated earnings by 54.0%, revealing an EPS of $-0.06 compared to the projected figure. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 end day with gains, Closing Bell reports.
Amazon Teamsters at JFK8 join historic strike, extending pickets to Staten Island. Thousands of Teamsters strike at DBK4.
news.summary: In a significant development, workers have expanded their picket lines to include the largest union facility in Staten Island. At midnight tonight, Amazon Teamsters at the JFK8 warehouse in Staten Island will unite in the ongoing strike against the corporate giant. This move sees them joining thousands of Teamsters currently striking at DBK4. The participation of the JFK8 warehouse workers adds to the growing number of individuals taking part in the historical strike, sending a strong message to Amazon.

news.headline: Potential economic impact of brief government shutdown is minimal, but it signals dysfunction.
news.summary: A brief interruption in funding may cause limited harm, potentially sending a concerning message about governmental inefficiency.

news.headline: US House to vote on stopgap bill at 5-5:30 PM ET - Punchbowl News.
Florida Blue Foundation gives Common Threads a $400,000 multi-year grant to tackle food insecurity in Miami.
news.summary: In Miami on December 20, 2024, Common Threads, a nationwide organization focused on nutrition education and promoting healthy cooking, announced the reception of a substantial $400,000 grant from the Florida Blue Foundation. The grant, part of the foundation's Food Security Grant program, will be disbursed over several years to support Common Threads' initiatives.

news.headline: FDA approves Zepbound for obstructive sleep apnea in obese adults with up to 20% weight loss and 25 fewer breathing interruptions.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted by Eli Lilly and Company, it was found that adults who took Zepbound experienced an average weight loss of up to 20%. Additionally, these adults also saw a significant improvement in their sleep quality with at least 25 fewer breathing interruptions per hour. Remarkably, up to 50% of the adults who took Zepbound over the course of one year no longer exhibited symptoms of Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA). The findings of this study showcase the potential benefits of Zepbound in managing weight and improving sleep quality in individuals with OSA.

news.headline: Arm loses licensing dispute to Qualcomm (QCOM) in battle over chip designs, significant for tech industry.
House to vote on new GOP stopgap measure after 5 PM ET.
Converge Tech (TSX: CTS) to pay Dec 2024 dividend a day earlier due to holidays.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Converge Technology Solutions Corp. (TSX: CTS) (FSE: 0ZB) (OTCQX: CTSDF) shared an update regarding their previous press release from November 12, 2024. The company, based in Toronto and Gatineau, QC, mentioned that due to the holiday schedule in December 2024, there will be a delay in certain operations.

news.headline: Seven sports celebrities and experts discuss changes in athlete branding at the DealBook Summit.
news.summary: During a recent event, a panel of seven sports personalities and industry experts gathered at the DealBook Summit to explore the evolving landscape of athlete branding. The discussion shed light on the transformation in strategies and approaches adopted by athletes to establish and cultivate their personal brands in the competitive sports industry.

news.headline: Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILAG) reports unaudited financial results for first half of 2024 from Hong Kong.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILAG), a leading lockset manufacturer and distributor based in Hong Kong, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the six months concluding...

news.headline: AtlasClear Holdings plans 1-for-60 reverse stock split of common stock (NYSE American: ATCH), effective Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: TAMPA, Fla.-- AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: ATCH) declared plans for a 1-for-60 reverse stock split of its common stock. This move by the Company is set to be implemented on December 31, 2024, pending the submission of the required amendment to the Company’s amended and restated certificate of incorporation with the Delaware Secretary of State. This consolidation of shares aims to streamline the outstanding shares and enhance the stock's market positioning.

news.headline: Mega Matrix (NYSE: MPU) reveals 2024 AGM results held virtually on Dec 20, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. PT. Shareholders...
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU) disclosed outcomes from its 2024 Annual General Meeting conducted virtually at 10:00 a.m. PT. During the meeting, the Company's shareholders: (1)...

news.headline: Mettler-Toledo (NYSE: MTD) to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 14, 2025, 3:45 pm PT. Leader in precision instruments.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) has disclosed its participation in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco, California, scheduled for Tuesday, January 14, 2025, at 3:45 p.m. PT. A live stream of the presentation will be accessible on the Company’s investor relations portal at investors.mt.com. METTLER TOLEDO (NYSE: MTD) is a prominent worldwide provider of precision instruments and services, boasting significant market influence.

news.headline: Electra Battery Materials Corp announces results of special meeting in Toronto on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Electra Battery Materials Corporation (NASDAQ: ELBM; TSX-V: ELBM) disclosed the outcomes of its special shareholder gathering in Toronto.

news.headline: Lexicon received a Complete Response Letter from the FDA for Zynquista™ (sotagliflozin); confirms prior disclosed FDA decision.
news.summary: Recently, it has been confirmed that the FDA has made a decision that was expected and had been previously disclosed. This decision has been eagerly awaited and comes after much anticipation.

news.headline: Source Energy Services refinances with a $135 million USD term loan with Silver Point Finance, and a $40 million CAD asset-backed loan with CIBC. Reduces outstanding 10.5% Senior Secured Notes due March 15, 2025.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on Dec. 20, 2024, Source Energy Services Ltd. (TSX: SHLE) announced the successful completion of a significant refinancing. The Company secured a new five-year $135 million USD term loan with Silver Point Finance, LLC and a new $40 million CND revolving asset-backed loan facility with the Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce. The Term Loan will be utilized to redeem the outstanding 10.5% Senior Secured Notes due March 15, 2025, and to repay the amounts drawn on the current asset-backed loan facility.

news.headline: Ultragenyx granted 15,175 restricted stock units to 15 non-executive officers as inducement for joining.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in rare and ultrarare disease therapies, announced the issuance of 15,175 restricted stock units of company stock to 15 newly recruited non-executive officers. These stock units were granted under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on December 16, 2024, following approval from the compensation committee of the board of directors. The issuance was deemed crucial in attracting these new employees as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Xcel Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: XELB) announces Q3 2024 financial results, highlighting expertise in livestream shopping.
news.summary: In New York on December 20, 2024, Xcel Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: XELB) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. Xcel, a prominent media and consumer products firm acclaimed for its adeptness in livestream shopping and social commerce, revealed their quarterly results on this date.

news.headline: Teva will discuss Q4 and FY 2024 results, and 2025 financial guidance on Jan 29, 2025, at 8 a.m. ET through a conference call.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 20, 2024, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE: TEVA) disclosed plans to release its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 alongside the financial outlook for 2025. The press release is scheduled for Wednesday, January 29, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call and live webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. This information was shared with the public through global news outlets.

news.headline: US bank deposits rose to $17.836 trln from $17.834 trln in the prior week.
News alert: Transparency notifications have been issued, revealing significant shareholdings exceeding 5% in the company.
Liechtenstein becomes 52nd nation to sign NASA's Artemis Accords for space exploration on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Liechtenstein officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the 52nd nation to do so. The agreement was signed during a ceremony held at NASA headquarters in Washington and was presided over by NASA Deputy Administrator Pam Melroy. Liechtenstein's commitment to the responsible exploration of space aligns with the principles outlined in the accords, aimed at fostering cooperative and sustainable space exploration endeavors.

news.headline: CUB expresses concern over ICC approval of ComEd's grid plan and $606M rate hike in Chicago.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 20, 2024, CUB Executive Director Sarah Moskowitz released a statement regarding the Thursday, December 19 ruling by the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) to authorize a grid plan for Commonwealth Edison and implement a multi-year rate hike of $606 million. Moskowitz expressed concerns about the implications of this decision.

news.headline: KB Home announced grand opening of Westcott Station in Sacramento, offering two-story homes with three bedrooms.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has launched the Westcott Station development in a sought-after neighborhood. These new homes cater to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchens flowing into spacious great rooms, primary suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage areas. The two-story residences at Westcott Station comprise three bedrooms and two-and-a-half bathrooms, illustrating the company's commitment to creating homes that align with current lifestyle needs. This initiative showcases KB Home's dedication to providing top-quality residences in desirable locations.

news.headline: Independent Bank Corporation to release Q4 2024 earnings on Jan 23, 2025 at 8:00 am ET. Check IndependentBank.com for details.
news.summary: Michigan-based community bank, Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP), is set to reveal its 2024 fourth quarter results on January 23, 2025, around 8:00 am ET. The results will be published on IndependentBank.com under the “News” section of the “Investor Relations” portion of the site.

news.headline: Hawk Tuah girl Hailey Welch cooperates with lawyers suing meme coin partners after waking up.
news.summary: Haliey Welch, the young woman known as Hawk Tuah, has decided to break her silence and is now collaborating with the legal team representing her in a lawsuit against her former business associates involved in the creation of a meme coin.

news.headline: Camden National Corp. gets regulatory nod for merging with Northway Financial, Inc. NASDAQ: CAC. Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Camden, Maine, on December 20, 2024, Camden National Corporation ("Camden National"), a bank holding company for Camden National Bank, disclosed receiving regulatory green lights for its planned merger. The corporation, trading as NASDAQ: CAC, confirmed that all required approvals have been secured.
